Skip to contents
BrainEnrich 2.0.0
  • Reference
    • Preparation of gene sets (annoData)
    • Group-level Enrichment Analysis (brainenrich)
    • Individual-level enrichment analysis (brainscore/brainscore.lm_test)
    • Simulation analysis (brainscore.simulate)
    • Computation on HPC with slurm

Package index

All functions

Anno2Table()
Convert annotation object to pathway table
FilterTable()
Filter and intersect genes in annotation table
Table2Anno()
Convert a data frame to EnrichAnno
aggregate_geneSet()
Aggregate Gene Set Scores
aggregate_geneSetList()
Aggregate Gene Set List in Parallel
aggregate_geneSetList_matching_coexp()
Aggregate Gene Set List with Matching Coexpression in Parallel
anno_env_to_EnrichAnno()
Internal helper to convert a legacy annotation environment to EnrichAnno.
anno_term_description()
Internal helper to map term id to description.
anno_to_geneSetList()
Internal helper to build a named gene-set list from EnrichAnno.
ask_user_continue()
Prompt User to Continue with Yes/No Input
be_cache_dir()
Internal helper: user cache directory for BrainEnrich assets.
be_extdata_root()
Internal helper: locate packaged extdata root.
be_parallel_lapply()
Internal helper: apply a function with a safe parallel backend
be_resolve_data_file()
Internal helper: resolve data file from package extdata or cache.
be_resolve_n_cores()
Internal helper: resolve requested cores
brain_data
Brain Data PC1 for Left Hemisphere
brainenrich()
Perform brain gene set analysis
brainscore()
Calculate Brain Scores for Gene Sets
brainscore.lm_test()
Perform linear model testing on brain scores
brainscore.simulate()
Perform Brain Score Simulation
calculate_pvals()
Calculate P-Values
calculate_qvalue_local()
Internal q-value helper aligned with the legacy DOSE behavior.
coord_dk_lh
Desikan Centroid Coordinates for Left Hemisphere
corr_brain_gene()
Calculate correlations or associations between gene and brain data
filter_geneSetList()
Filter gene set list
find_core_genes()
Find core genes influencing aggregated score or LM coefficients
generate_null_brain_data()
Generate Null Brain Data
get_annoData()
Load gene set annotation data
get_geneExp()
Get gene expression data
get_geneSetList()
Get gene set list
get_termDescription()
Get gene set descriptions
identify_core_genes()
Identify core genes with directional labels
is_EnrichAnno()
Check if object is EnrichAnno
is_EnrichRes()
Check if object is EnrichRes
job_cat()
Combine Results from Saved RDS Files
job_splitter()
Distribute and Process Iterations Across HPC Jobs
new_EnrichAnno()
Construct an EnrichAnno object
new_EnrichRes()
Construct an EnrichRes object
perm_id_dk_lh_5000
Permutation index for left Desikan regions (5000 permutations)
plot_core_genes()
Plot core genes for a term
plot_heatmap_terms()
Plot a permutation heatmap for top terms
plot_term_network()
Plot a lightweight term overlap network
plot_terms()
Plot term-level enrichment results
resample_gene()
Resample Gene List
resample_geneSetList_matching_coexp()
Resample Gene Sets with Specified Constraints
rotate_parcellation()
Rotate Parcellation
sample_gs_matching_coexp()
Sample Gene Sets Matching Co-Expression
sim_hcp
Simulated data from HCP data
simple_lm()
Perform Linear Regression with Multiple Predictors and Covariates
split_Anno()
Split annotation data
swap_geneList()
Swap Gene List

Developed by Zhipeng Cao.
